label: Website hero asset
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous demo website hero asset
Primary request: Create a polished website hero image in the exact visual style of the visible Morphous Snow Leopard design-system board. Use the same pale fur background, charcoal rosette marks, warm undercoat greys, quiet alpine collage, soft paper texture, crisp shadcn-style UI cards, and restrained monochrome palette.
Input images: The visible design-system board is the style reference; the visible snow leopard cutout is the animal reference.
Composition: wide website hero banner, 16:9, snow leopard on the right standing over angular alpine rock shapes, left side reserved for live HTML text overlay with low-detail negative space, bottom edge includes layered mountain collage and rosette texture fragments.
Visual details: premium product design system aesthetic, subtle grain, soft shadow, sharp grid alignment, rounded UI cards no larger than supporting accents, refined neutral colors matching the animal.
Text: no readable text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no watermark.
Avoid: saturated colors, purple gradients, stock photo look, blurry dark overlays, busy background behind the left text area.

label: Rosette texture asset
prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: Morphous demo website texture asset
Primary request: Create a seamless-feeling square texture tile in the exact visual style of the visible Morphous Snow Leopard design-system board. Combine snow leopard rosette markings, pale winter fur, warm undercoat grey, soft handmade paper grain, and faint alpine stone facets.
Composition: square 1:1 texture, no central subject, balanced all-over pattern suitable for CSS background panels and card accents.
Visual details: subtle neutral monochrome palette sampled from snow leopard fur, low contrast, tactile paper texture, crisp but organic rosette marks, no hard seams, no UI elements.
Text: no readable text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no watermark.
Avoid: saturated colors, purple/blue gradients, high-contrast camouflage, photographic animal body parts, busy noisy texture.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the Morphous Snow Leopard design-system board in the same style as the visible light design-system reference. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Input images: The visible light Morphous Snow Leopard design-system board is the primary style/layout reference; the visible snow leopard cutout is the animal and palette reference.
Canvas: wide 16:9 design-system board.
Required visible text labels: Morphous Snow Leopard, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Texture, Tokens, Slides, Buttons, Inputs, Status, Primary, Secondary, Accent, Muted, Border, Background, Foreground.
Visual details: deep charcoal and spot-black background from the animal markings, pale fur text, warm undercoat greys, subtle rosette texture overlays, alpine stone collage, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls, readable labels, dashboard cards, sidebar navigation, token table, slide thumbnails.
Style: premium monochrome product design system, restrained contrast, soft paper grain, precise grid, 8px card radius, no purple gradients, no unrelated saturated colors.
Avoid: illegible text, random brand names, misspelled main title, stock-photo look, full black flat background, neon colors, cluttered composition.
